user_goal: 在 B014 经验签收（2020 max DD -4.76% / 2022 max DD -1.66%）后，针对其跨策略对比发现的 'B013 在非危机期间绝对收益让出给 60/40' 现象做最小研究批次：给 B013 加 regime_activation_policy 参数（always_on 默认 / only_non_normal / only_crisis），让 L1 200-SMA 趋势过滤按当前 regime label 条件启用；L2 inverse-vol + 8% target 与 L3 crisis 减半不变；默认保持 B013 现状 bit-for-bit；在 B014 真实 snapshot 上跨 policy 与 B006/B010/60-40 对比，看是否缩窄 absolute-return gap。**不修改 B013 strategy code 外的任何文件**（包括 B010/B011 等），保留 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。
generator_handoff: B015 F001-F005 done (Generator). Run pytest / ruff / mypy / compileall to reproduce: 423 tests, 0 ruff issues, 0 mypy issues in 44 trade/ files, all *.py syntactically valid. Evaluator focus areas for F006: (1) config: regime_activation_policy ∈ {always_on, only_non_normal, only_crisis}; default=always_on; parameter_hash includes the field — tests in test_regime_adaptive_config.py. (2) should_l1_gate_run truth table — test_regime_adaptive_trend_gating.py contains the 9-cell parametrized test. (3) backwards-compat: test_regime_adaptive_b015_backwards_compat.py verifies always_on gating mask == direct apply_trend_gating output bit-for-bit, l1_active=True every period, equity/weight/gating histories deterministic across runs. (4) Comparative report: scripts/generate_b015_activation_policy_report.py emits docs/test-reports/B015-regime-adaptive-activation-policy-comparison-2026-05-14.md + JSON sidecar; current committed copy reflects manifest-absent path (real_data_status=skipped, synthetic 9-asset fixture, B014 baselines from sidecar). To exercise the real-data path: run scripts/fetch_yfinance_regime_adaptive_csvs.py + scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py to produce data/public-cache/regime-adaptive-prices-manifest.json, then re-run the generate script. (5) Safety: no new broker/AI/network imports; activation_policy_comparison.py imports only csv/json + trade modules; activation_policy_report.py imports only json + trade modules; no os.environ reads in any strategy module. Output naming: B013/B011 strategy code & specs unmodified; only trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/ (+ scripts/generate_b015_*) + tests + docs/test-reports/B015-* changed in B015.

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14 B015 planning: B014 done wrap-up confirmed empirical stress PASS (2020 DD -4.76% / 2022 DD -1.66%) but cross-strategy comparison surfaced B013 underperformance vs static 60/40 in calm window (126726 vs 158978 in 2020-06..2022-12). User selected B015 'regime-aware activation' as the small-scope research follow-up. Decisions captured: (1) single new config field regime_activation_policy with three values (always_on default / only_non_normal / only_crisis); (2) gate applies only to L1 trend gating; L2 inverse-vol + 8% target and L3 crisis halving unchanged; (3) default always_on must reproduce B013 signoff bit-for-bit on synthetic fixture (backwards-compat hard requirement); (4) comparative backtest runs on B014 real snapshot for all three policies + B006 + B010 + 60/40; (5) B015 mutates only files inside trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/ (config + trend_gating + backtest) plus tests + new report — B010/B011/B012/B013 spec & strategy code untouched; (6) Master Portfolio regime_adaptive sleeve registration uses default always_on so B011 invariants preserved automatically; (7) no broker/AI/paper/live language anywhere. Wrote B015 spec and features.json (6 features: F001-F005 generator + F006 codex; mixed batch). Status moved to building for Generator F001.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-14 F005 done. Added test_regime_adaptive_b015_backwards_compat.py with 10 tests covering: default config still always_on; always_on backtest gating mask == direct apply_trend_gating output bit-for-bit (per period); l1_active is True every period under always_on; equity/weights/gating histories deterministic across two runs; activation_policy_comparison run does not open sockets; both new B015 modules carry research-only disclaimer in docstrings; neither reads os.environ / os.getenv; committed B015 markdown + JSON sidecar contain the research-only disclaimer and no paper/live execution phrasing; rendered markdown also has no forbidden trade terms. Full repo: 423 tests + ruff 0 issues + mypy 44 trade/ files clean + compileall all green. B013 / B011 / B012 strategy code & specs untouched. Status moved building → verifying for Codex F006 independent verification. Generator handoff captured in generator_handoff field above.
